title: Department of Nursing Doctorate Program Mission and Vision
content:
Department of Nursing Doctorate Program Mission and Vision

Vision:

To be a leading force at national and international level in improving the health of the society with its nursing education, research and practices.

Mission:

To educate nurses who are capable of training, research and practice based on scientific and ethical values in order to protect and improve the health of the society.
